task: Post Log catch-up and auto-create integration
actions: Created 42 new Post Log entries from IG/FB/YT platform data (Mar 31 - Apr 7)
Fixed incorrect titles (Ted Lucas → 99 Jamz BTS, milestone post)
Integrated auto_create_entries() into sync.py with --auto-create flag (also runs on --all)
Cleaned up 3 duplicate scheduled agents → 1 agent every 6 hours
Updated agent instruction to use --all which now includes auto-create
Final state: 102 Post Log entries, 41 Content Calendar entries, 85 entries with views > 0
outcome: Post Log now auto-creates entries for new posts found on platforms. No more manual entry needed for IG/FB/YT.
